entries.title: Expression enhancements
entries.description: A few new expressions have been added. These make it possible to add models with different language translations and have text updated based on the language of the website. But the expression that returns the language only returns the language of the website itself. It does not take into account the language preferences that any specific visitor may have.

entries.title: Translation to Swedish
entries.description: The platform has been partially translated to Swedish. But there are a lot left to be translated.

entries.title: Add and remove collaborators
entries.description: It is now possible to add collaborators to a website and remove them again.

entries.title: A new reactive renderer
entries.description: A new reactive renderer has been created to improve performance when the page is large. The previous renderer was also reactive in the sense that it rerendered all components whenever something changed. In many cases something would frequently change, so all components would rerender frequently. The new reactive renderer should only rerender components that were affected by a change. It has been tested in many ways, but there may still be bugs left to be fixed.

entries.description: Beta version 22 of Ophixor has been released. The version is 0.22.0.

entries.title: Fix the cookie banner
entries.description: The cookie banner did not work as expected and has been fixed.

entries.title: Editor enhancements
entries.description: The editor is now available for free to try out. It is now possible to choose how you want to view the page when editing. Either as mobile, tablet or desktop. A tooltip has also been added with some component documentation.

entries.description: Add one missing prop to the Section component.

entries.title: Version 0.19.0 released
entries.description: The 19:th beta version of Ophixor has been released. The version is 0.19.0.

entries.title: Language enhancements
entries.description: The 'lang' attribute of the 'html' element is now taking the default language of the website into account. It's currently only possible to specify English and Swedish as default language.

entries.title: Color system enhancements
entries.description: The CSS color variables for all components now refer to other variables and not to specific colors. This will allow for easier color palette overrides in the future. The reason it wasn't done earlier is because the color picker did not have support for variables. Now it does.

entries.title: Documentation enhancements
entries.description: The documentation page has been updated. It is now not just one page, but many. The documentation covers components, expressions and actions.

entries.description: Add one missing prop to the TableData component.

entries.description: A few new expressions have been added.

entries.title: Add the Canvas component
entries.description: A new Canvas component has been added. It comes with its own set of actions and expressions, so it can be programmatically rendered.

entries.title: Expression enhancements
entries.description: A few new expressions have been added.

entries.title: Add one prop to Card
entries.description: Add one missing prop to the Card component.

entries.title: Add one prop to Button
entries.description: Add one missing prop to the Button component.

entries.title: HTML export enhancements
entries.description: The isVisible prop for components that supports it are now taken into account when exporting.

entries.title: Add one prop to Badge
entries.description: Add one missing prop to the Badge component.

entries.title: Action enhancements
entries.description: A few new actions have been added.

entries.title: Version 0.18.0 released
entries.description: The 18:th beta version of Ophixor has been released. The version is 0.18.0.

entries.title: Expression enhancements
entries.description: A few new expressions have been added.

entries.title: Workflow editor enhancements
entries.description: Some enhancements have been made to the workflow editor. Nodes that will be discarded when saving are translucent. They will be discarded if they are not directly or indirectly connected to the main root. The first node of correct kind (or type) with no parent is considered the main root. Another improvement is that most nodes that are already connected will have to be disconnected before they can be reconnected. This is so that they can only have one connection at a time. The viewport has also been fixed so it centers based on the nodes.

entries.title: Template ID fix
entries.description: Templates previously discarded IDs so new IDs would be generated when importing. This would then cause problems when IDs were being referenced. The new approach is to create mappings from old IDs to new IDs and update all references to the old IDs with the new IDs within the template.

entries.title: Action enhancements
entries.description: A few new actions have been added.

entries.title: WebSocket
entries.description: You can now enable the WebSocket feature for your pages. There is also a setting for automatically connecting it.

entries.title: Action enhancements
entries.description: A few new actions have been added. One is for setting some arbitrary state and the other is for broadcasting messages over WebSocket.

entries.title: Expression enhancements
entries.description: A new expression has been added.

entries.description: Add one missing prop to the Page component.

entries.title: Version 0.17.0 released
entries.description: The 17:th beta version of Ophixor has been released. The version is 0.17.0. This release mainly includes fixes and improvements for the platform itself.

entries.title: Version 0.16.0 released
entries.description: The 16:th beta version of Ophixor has been released. The version is 0.16.0.

entries.title: A workflow editor has been introduced
entries.description: Today we introduce our new workflow editor where you can build your action and expression workflows. It is a node-based editor with support for drag-and-drop, panning and zooming. This editor will make it much easier to build action and expression workflows than the previous form-based editor that also required multiple dialogs. Now you will see how everything is connected at once.

entries.title: Version 0.13.0 released
entries.description: The 13:th beta version of Ophixor has been released. The version is 0.13.0.

entries.title: Expression enhancements
entries.description: A few new expressions have been added.

entries.title: Action enhancements
entries.description: A new action for updating component props has been added. These props are not saved, unless you run the action in the editor and save the page.

entries.title: Fix the SideBar component
entries.description: The SideBar component is now responsive and shows a thinner bar with expand and collapse functionality when viewed on a mobile phone or tablet. This functionality has not been added to the HTML export pipeline yet.

entries.title: HTML export enhancements
entries.description: CSS selectors are now included when exporting to HTML. This pipeline still has some limitations. For example it will only export code based on the viewport that was used when exporting. This means that if you have different values for mobile, tablet and desktop it will only export for one of those at a time. It also does not take into account the isVisible prop that can be used for some components. The components Map and RichText are not supported. Images are not exported.

entries.title: Fix export of Element
entries.description: The export pipeline was not exporting the Element component in a correct way. That has now been fixed.

entries.title: Version 0.12.0 released
entries.description: The twelfth beta version of Ophixor has been released. The version is 0.12.0.

entries.title: Change the default value for borderColor and borderWidth in Grid
entries.description: Change the default value for the prop borderColor from "#e5e7eb" to "transparent" and the default value for the prop borderWidth from "1px" to "0px" in the Grid component. The previous default values will still be used in the editor when adding a new Grid. This is mainly so you can see where it is.

entries.title: Change the default value for borderColor and borderWidth in Section
entries.description: Change the default value for the prop borderColor from "#e5e7eb" to "transparent" and the default value for the prop borderWidth from "1px" to "0px" in the Section component. The previous default values will still be used in the editor when adding a new Section. This is mainly so you can see where it is.

entries.title: Component rendering optimization
entries.description: A lot of optimization improvements have been made to the component rendering pipeline.

entries.title: Add the Element component
entries.description: A new Element component has been added. It supports a lot of CSS properties and many element or tag types. One use-case is when converting an existing page to the schema and you need CSS properties that are not used by the other components. This component does not have any style by default.

entries.title: Add props to Button
entries.description: Add multiple missing props to the Button component. Some of these props are overrides and they are not set by default.

entries.title: Add props to Section
entries.description: Add multiple missing props to the Section component. Some of these props are overrides and they are not set by default.

entries.title: Remove props from Grid
entries.description: Remove multiple props from the Grid component.

entries.title: Remove props from Section
entries.description: Remove multiple props from the Section component.

entries.title: Add support for responsive props
entries.description: All component props that are used for CSS can now be changed for different pre-determined viewport sizes. These are mobile up to and including 768px, tablet above 768px and up to and including 1024px and desktop above 1024px. This update will make the props that are used specifically for different viewport sizes redundant. So they will be removed.

entries.title: Add props to Section
entries.description: Add multiple missing props to the Section component.

entries.description: The tenth beta version of Ophixor has been released. The version is 0.10.0.

entries.title: HTML export enhancements
entries.description: When exporting HTML it now exports JavaScript in a script in head. But only if necessary. It also only exports default CSS for a given component type if it is used on the page. So it should result in less code in most cases.

entries.description: A cookie banner and the legal pages for cookies, privacy and terms have been added. Some changes have also been made to the landing page. A new logo has been created.

entries.description: Add one missing prop to the Map component. This allows you to provide a way to manage consent for cookies.

entries.title: Component selectors
entries.description: A new feature called selectors has been added. All components supports it. It's possible to override any CSS property in various states using this feature.

entries.description: Add one missing prop to the Section component.

entries.title: Version 0.7.0 released
entries.description: The seventh beta version of Ophixor has been released. The version is 0.7.0.

entries.title: HTML export enhancements
entries.description: The HTML export system has been updated to support data sources, expressions, prop bindings and integrations. The exported HTML will still be static, but it results in a snapshot of the page rendered when exporting. Images are not exported so you may have to change the URL in the src attribute manually. At least for relative URLs.

entries.title: Model enhancements
entries.description: Models can now specify plain-text or rich-text for the string type.

entries.title: Add content to the documentation page
entries.description: Content has been added to the documentation page. It is built from the component schemas.

entries.title: Add new elements to Section
entries.description: The Section component can now be used to create more element types; header, nav, main, footer, aside, details, summary, figure and figcaption.

entries.description: Add one missing prop to the Form component.

entries.description: Add one missing prop to the Grid component.

entries.description: Add one missing prop to the Alert component.

entries.description: Some new expressions have been added. These are suitable for the isVisible prop that was just added to the Section component.

entries.description: Add one missing prop to the Section component.

entries.description: Add multiple missing props to the Image component.

entries.title: Add props to Section
entries.description: Add multiple missing props to the Section component.

entries.title: Change the default value for flexShrink in Alert
entries.description: Change the default value for the prop flexShrink from "0" to "1" in the Alert component.

entries.title: Change the default value for flexShrink in Section
entries.description: Change the default value for the prop flexShrink from "0" to "1" in the Section component.

entries.description: A new RichText component has been added.

entries.title: Add the Map component
entries.description: A new Map component has been added.

entries.title: Add the Spinner component

entries.title: Version 0.5.0 released
entries.description: The fifth beta version of Ophixor has been released. The version is 0.5.0.

entries.title: Action enhancements
entries.description: The action system has been updated to use a dialog and it also uses internal expression dialogs for configuration.

entries.title: Expression enhancements
entries.description: Enhancements has been made to the expression system.

entries.title: Integration enhancements
entries.description: Integrations can now be used as a data source for components. Similar to how expressions and models can be.

entries.title: Component prop sanitization fix
entries.description: In a previous update the prop sanitization would remove all default prop values. It should only remove all default CSS-based prop values. Not default content. This has been fixed.

entries.title: Version 0.4.0 released
entries.description: The fourth beta version of Ophixor has been released. The version is 0.4.0.

entries.title: Integrations
entries.description: The first version of the integration feature is now available. You can create, update and delete integrations. They can also be tested.

entries.title: Add props to Switch
entries.description: Add multiple missing props to the Switch component.

entries.title: Add one prop to Section
entries.description: Add one missing prop to the Section component.

entries.title: Data source enhancements
entries.description: The expression editor for data sources has been moved to a dialog that makes it easier to build expressions.

entries.title: Component prop optimization
entries.description: Component props are now discarded when set to their default values. This reduces memory storage in the database and increases runtime performance when rendering.

entries.title: Expression engine enhancements
entries.description: Some new expressions have been added.

entries.title: Page code dialog
entries.description: A dialog where you can view the page code has been added. It can be opened from the context menu.

entries.title: Property editor enhancements
entries.description: The property editor has been updated with some icons and better CSS property handling.

entries.title: Expression editor enhancements
entries.description: The expression editor has been moved to a dialog that makes it easier to build expressions.

entries.title: Page loading fix
entries.description: Page loading did not work as expected when navigating between pages. This has been fixed.

entries.title: MenuBar enhancements
entries.description: The MenuBar component now shows what page it is on. A more customizable solution will be needed in the future.

entries.title: Expression enhancements
entries.description: Expressions can now be used on props that are items and on their internal props. This allows items to be constructed from models and their data.

entries.title: Version 0.3.0 released
entries.description: The third beta version of Ophixor has been released. The version is 0.3.0.

entries.title: Integrations page
entries.description: An integrations page has been added. It is currently empty. The goal with this feature is to allow for integrations with any other service. Maybe you need to retrieve data from somewhere or perform an action to some other website. That's where this feature will be used.

entries.title: Model enhancements
entries.description: Models can now specify single-line or multi-line for the string type.

entries.title: Change the default values for minHeight and minWidth in Badge
entries.description: Change the default values for the props minHeight and minWidth from "0px" to "auto" in the Badge component.

entries.title: Model enhancements
entries.description: This update makes it possible to view and update models as well as create, view, update and delete data for the models. Before this update some models and data were hard-coded. This is no longer the case. All models and data for a given website are loaded right now. But this will change in the future in order to optimize loading so it scales with a lot of data.

description.en: Fix a bug in variant selection. It now overrides all props with the default ones before applying the variant props. Earlier only the default variant would do that.
description.sv: En bugg med variantval har blivit fixad. Nu skriver den över alla egenskaper med de ursprungliga innan den applicerar variantens egenskaper. Tidigare gjordes detta enbart på standardvarianten.

title.en: Fix labels from Swedish to English
title.sv: Fixat etiketter på svenska till engelska

description.en: Fix labels for the theme prop. They were in Swedish and are now in English.
description.sv: Fixat etiketter för temaegenskapen. De var på svenska och är nu på engelska.

description.en: The first beta version of Ophixor has been released. The version is 0.1.0.
description.sv: Den första betaversionen av Ophixor har släppts. Versionen är 0.1.0.
